column3: Welcome, adventurer. I have been stationed here to assist those brave enough to enter these dungeons.
Is there anything I can help you with?
column4: ((ChoiceText=INVTEXT("Tell me about combat."),NextNodeId="guide_combat_1",RequiredFlag=None,SetsFlag=None),(ChoiceText=INVTEXT("Tell me about my inventory."),NextNodeId="guide_inv_1",RequiredFlag=None,SetsFlag=None),(ChoiceText=INVTEXT("I am ready. Goodbye."),NextNodeId=None,RequiredFlag=None,SetsFlag=None))

column3: Click on an enemy to attack. Your melee level determines your accuracy and max hit. Eat food to restore health - it does not regenerate on its own.
You have 28 inventory slots. Equip better gear to improve your combat stats. Keep food and potions on hand. Hold Shift and left-click an item to drop it.
Welcome back! The portal to the forest is just north of town. Stock up on food before you head out — there is no coming back for a quick rest.
Is there anything else I can help you with?
Past the forest lies an ancient dungeon, and at its heart — the Dungeon Lord. No one who has faced him has returned to tell the tale. Yet.
Halt! ...Oh, it is just you. Carry on, adventurer. The town is safe as long as I am on watch.
The forest crawls with goblins and worse. I would not go out there without a decent sword and plenty of food. You have been warned.
Good day, adventurer. Welcome to the bank. The chest nearby holds all your worldly possessions — safe and sound between your runs.
Is there anything else you need?
Click the chest to open your bank. You can deposit items here before heading into the dungeon and withdraw them when you return.
Welcome to my smithy! Use a knife on logs or ore to fletch and smith items. Click the anvil to smith bars into weapons, or the forge to smelt ore into bars.
Anything else I can help you with?
Fletching is simple: have a knife and some logs in your inventory, then use the knife on the logs. A menu will appear showing what you can make.
For smithing, first smelt ore at the forge into bars. Then use a hammer and bars at the anvil to craft weapons and armour. Higher smithing levels unlock better items.
